creator: olivier.brisson@gmail.com
text:
On a brand new system where FreeBSD (10.1-RELEASE-p6 FreeBSD 10.1-RELEASE-p6 #0: Tue Feb 24 19:00:21 UTC 2015) has been installed, aegisub fails to compile. 

c++ -MMD -MP -I/usr/local/include -I/usr/ports/multimedia/aegisub/work/FFMS-ffms2-f673b48/include -DLIBICONV_PLUG -I/usr/ports/multimedia/aegisub/work/aegisub-3.2.2/src/ -I.. -I/usr/ports/multimedia/aegisub/work/aegisub-3.2.2/src/include -I/usr/ports/multimedia/aegisub/work/aegisub-3.2.2/libaegisub/include -I/usr/ports/multimedia/aegisub/work/aegisub-3.2.2/build -D_THREAD_SAFE  -I/usr/local/include   -I/usr/local/include    -O2 -pipe  -DLIBICONV_PLUG -fstack-protector -fno-strict-aliasing  -DLIBICONV_PLUG -Wno-c++11-narrowing -std=c++11 -I/usr/local/lib/wx/include/gtk2-unicode-3.0 -I/usr/local/include/wx-3.0 -D_FILE_OFFSET_BITS=64 -DWXUSINGDLL -D__WXGTK__ -D_THREAD_SAFE -include acconf.h -I/usr/local/include/hunspell   -c -o /usr/ports/multimedia/aegisub/work/aegisub-3.2.2/src/spellchecker_hunspell.o /usr/ports/multimedia/aegisub/work/aegisub-3.2.2/src/spellchecker_hunspell.cpp
c++ -o /usr/ports/multimedia/aegisub/work/aegisub-3.2.2/tools/repack-thes-dict -L/usr/local/lib -fstack-protector /usr/ports/multimedia/aegisub/work/aegisub-3.2.2/tools/repack-thes-dict.o /usr/ports/multimedia/aegisub/work/aegisub-3.2.2/lib/libaegisub.a -lm  -L/usr/local/lib -lboost_filesystem -lboost_locale -lboost_regex -lboost_system -lboost_thread -lboost_chrono -L/usr/local/lib -licuuc -licudata   -licui18n -L/usr/local/lib -licuuc -licudata   -pthread 
/usr/local/lib/libboost_locale.so: undefined reference to `libiconv'
/usr/local/lib/libboost_locale.so: undefined reference to `libiconv_close'
/usr/local/lib/libboost_locale.so: undefined reference to `libiconv_open'
c++: error: linker command failed with exit code 1 (use -v to see invocation)
Makefile.target:64: recipe for target '/usr/ports/multimedia/aegisub/work/aegisub-3.2.2/tools/repack-thes-dict' failed
gmake[2]: *** [/usr/ports/multimedia/aegisub/work/aegisub-3.2.2/tools/repack-thes-dict] Error 1
gmake[2]: *** Waiting for unfinished jobs....
gmake[2]: Leaving directory '/usr/ports/multimedia/aegisub/work/aegisub-3.2.2'
===> Compilation failed unexpectedly.
Try to set MAKE_JOBS_UNSAFE=yes and rebuild before reporting the failure to
the maintainer.
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make[1]: stopped in /usr/ports/multimedia/aegisub
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/multimedia/aegisub
** Command failed [exit code 1]: /usr/bin/script -qa /tmp/portinstall20150321-944-gj4whf env make
** Fix the problem and try again.
** Listing the failed packages (-:ignored / *:skipped / !:failed)
        ! multimedia/aegisub    (linker error)


More informations about my system:
* libiconv-1.14_6
* boost-libs-1.55.0_4 

I tried to set MAKE_JOBS_UNSAFE=yes but it did not change anything.
